name: Chicken in Black Bean Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into 3/4 inch pieces.
2. Combine sherry, soy and sesame oil in a 4-cup microwaveable casserole.
3. Toss chicken in mixture, cover and marinate while preparing other ingredients.
4. In a small saucepan, combine stock, cornstarch, soy sauce, sugar, chili paste; set aside on medium heat until smooth.
5. Prepare garlic, ginger and black beans; set aside.
6. Microwave chicken and marinade, covered at high for 4 to 6 minutes or until chicken is opaque and tender, stirring twice during cooking.
7. Stir in stock mixture into a glass measuring cup, microwave at high for 1 minute or until hot.
8. Add garlic, ginger and black beans; microwave uncovered at high for 1 minute or until fragrant.
9. Stir in remaining stock mixture until smooth; microwave at high for 1 to 3 minutes or until sauce thickens.
10. Stir once, drain liquid from chicken, pour black bean sauce over, stir and serve immediately.
